meaning: vt.使困窘,使局促不安,阻碍,麻烦
examples: I didn't want to embarrass him by kissing him in front of his friends.
When you embarrass me, I'll tell you.
They were my friends, and I just didn't want to embarrass them publicly.
The two said that they were trying to embarrass the senator, not hurt him.
Johnson stressed that his goal was to not embarrass any of the opposing kids.
